suspected_functions.reason: Frame #0 crash point at line 173. Null pointer dereference on rrcSetupComplete parameter. Missing NULL check before accessing rrcSetupComplete->dedicatedNAS_Message.size, which can lead to segmentation fault.
Frame #1 immediate caller. This function retrieves the UE context and passes it to rrc_gNB_send_NGAP_NAS_FIRST_REQ. If the context is NULL or invalid, it can lead to a crash in the called function.
This function calls rrc_gNB_send_NGAP_NAS_FIRST_REQ and directly passes rrcSetupComplete, which is set to NULL before the call. This will definitely cause a crash due to dereferencing a NULL pointer.
suspected_functions.role: Calls crash function rrc_gNB_send_NGAP_NAS_FIRST_REQ - check parameter passing

fix_suggestion.reason: The crash occurs due to a NULL assignment to the rrcSetupComplete parameter before it is used in the rrc_gNB_send_NGAP_NAS_FIRST_REQ function.

code_patches.description: Remove the rrcSetupComplete=NULL assignment that was invalidating the parameter before use
Add NULL check for rrcSetupComplete before dereferencing it

fix_suggestion.root_cause_analysis: The root cause of the segmentation fault is the NULL assignment to the rrcSetupComplete variable in the rrc_gNB_process_RRCSetupComplete function, which is then passed to rrc_gNB_send_NGAP_NAS_FIRST_REQ without validation.

fix_suggestion.root_cause_analysis: The root cause of the segmentation fault is the NULL assignment to the rrcSetupComplete variable in the rrc_gNB_process_RRCSetupComplete function, which is then passed to rrc_gNB_send_NGAP_NAS_FIRST_REQ without validation.
